questions.q: What is the height range of the Lesser Himalaya given in the text?
questions.urdu: متن میں کم تر مالیہ کی بلندی کا دائرہ کیا بتایا گیا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • The Lesser Himalaya is a middle mountain range of the Himalayas.

questions.q: According to the 2017 census, what was the overall sex ratio in Pakistan?
questions.urdu: سن 2017 کی مردم شماری کے مطابق پاکستان میں مجموعی جنسی تناسب کیا تھا؟
questions.explanation: Key Provincial Sex Ratios (2017 Census):

questions.q: The Cripps Mission visited India in?
questions.urdu: کرپس مشن نے کس سال ہندوستان کا دورہ کیا؟
questions.explanation: *

questions.q: Which event marked the final collapse of unity?
questions.urdu: اتحاد کے حتمی خاتمے کی علامت کون سا واقعہ تھا؟
questions.explanation: • The 1971 conflict (Pakistan–India war leading to East Pakistan separation) marked the final collapse of unity.

questions.q: Which disparity was most critical in East-West relations?
questions.urdu: مشرقی اور مغربی پاکستان کے تعلقات میں سب سے اہم عدم توازن کون سا تھا؟
questions.explanation: • The most critical issue between East and West Pakistan was economic disparity.

questions.q: Which characteristic increases the economic importance of a seaport?
questions.urdu: بندرگاہ کی معاشی اہمیت کو کون سی خصوصیت بڑھاتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • A seaport becomes economically important when it is well connected with international trade routes and global markets.

questions.q: Which factor most reduces effective water availability?
questions.urdu: پانی کی مؤثر دستیابی کو سب سے زیادہ کون سی چیز کم کرتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Water losses in canals (through seepage, evaporation, and leakage) significantly reduce effective water availability.

questions.q: Pakistan's geo-strategic importance is enhanced due to?
questions.urdu: پاکستان کی جغرافیائی و تزویراتی اہمیت کس وجہ سے بڑھتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Pakistan’s geo-strategic importance comes from its location at the crossroads of South Asia, Central Asia, and the Middle East.

questions.q: Which natural region is least suitable for intensive agriculture?
questions.urdu: کون سا قدرتی علاقہ زیادہ زرعی کاشت کے لیے سب سے کم موزوں ہے؟
questions.explanation: • The Balochistan Plateau is least suitable for intensive agriculture due to dry climate and low rainfall.

questions.q: Which factor explains seasonal rainfall variations in Pakistan?
questions.urdu: پاکستان میں موسمی بارشوں کے فرق کی بنیادی وجہ کیا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Seasonal rainfall in Pakistan is mainly controlled by the monsoon system.

questions.q: Which feature most distinguishes Pakistani society from a homogeneous structure?
questions.urdu: پاکستانی معاشرے کو یکساں ڈھانچے سے سب سے زیادہ کیا چیز مختلف بناتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Pakistani society is best described as culturally diverse rather than homogeneous.

questions.q: Which principle underlies the demand for a separate Muslim state?
questions.urdu: ایک الگ مسلم ریاست کے مطالبے کی بنیاد کون سا اصول ہے؟
questions.explanation: • The demand for a separate Muslim state was based on the Two-Nation Theory, which emphasized a distinct ideological identity for Muslims.

questions.q: Which condition most strengthened Muslim political identity before independence?
questions.urdu: آزادی سے پہلے مسلمانوں کی سیاسی شناخت کو سب سے زیادہ مضبوط کس حالت نے کیا؟
questions.explanation: • Muslims developed a strong political identity when they realized they were a minority under Hindu majority rule in British India.

questions.q: Quantum of energy is called?
questions.urdu: توانائی کے کوانٹم کو کیا کہا جاتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • A quantum of energy of light (electromagnetic radiation) is called a photon.

questions.q: Photoelectric emission stops if?
questions.urdu: فوٹو الیکٹرک اخراج کب رک جاتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Photoelectric emission stops when the frequency of incident light is below the threshold frequency of the metal.

questions.q: Spring tides occur when?
questions.urdu: بہار کی لہریں کب پیدا ہوتی ہیں؟
questions.explanation: • Spring tides occur when the Earth, Moon, and Sun are in a straight line (aligned).

questions.q: Which water source is most important for irrigation canals?
questions.urdu: آبپاشی (نہروں) کے لیے سب سے اہم پانی کا ذریعہ کون سا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Rivers are the main source of water for irrigation canals.

questions.q: Which sector uses energy mainly for machinery operation?
questions.urdu: کون سا شعبہ زیادہ تر توانائی مشینری چلانے کے لیے استعمال کرتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • The industrial sector uses energy mainly for running machines, factories, and production systems.

questions.q: Natural gas is transported mainly through?
questions.urdu: قدرتی گیس زیادہ تر کس ذریعے سے منتقل کی جاتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Natural gas is mainly transported through pipelines over long distances.

questions.q: Biomass energy is derived from?
questions.urdu: بایوماس توانائی کس چیز سے حاصل ہوتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Biomass energy is produced from organic matter such as plants, animals, and waste materials.

questions.q: Which organism is known as the powerhouse of the cell?
questions.urdu: کس جاندار کو سیل کا پاور ہاؤس کہا جاتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: Main Parts of a Cell:

questions.q: Which vitamin helps in the clotting of blood?
questions.urdu: کون سا وٹامن خون کے جمنے میں مدد کرتا ہے؟
questions.explanation:
Additional information:
    • Vitamin C may protect the body against the effects of pollution.
    • It may also prevent blood clots and reduce bruising.

questions.q: Laser light is intense due to?
questions.urdu: لیزر روشنی زیادہ شدید کیوں ہوتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Laser light is intense because its light waves are coherent, meaning they remain in the same phase and travel together.

questions.q: Which device converts digital signals into human-readable form?
questions.urdu: کون سا آلہ ڈیجیٹل سگنلز کو انسان کے پڑھنے کے قابل شکل میں تبدیل کرتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • The output unit converts processed digital data into human-readable form such as text, images, or sound.

questions.q: Isotones are atoms having same?
questions.urdu: آئسوٹون ایسے ایٹمز ہوتے ہیں جن میں کیا ایک جیسا ہوتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Isotones are atoms of different elements having the same number of neutrons.

questions.q: Which radiation has intermediate penetrating power?
questions.urdu: کون سی شعاع درمیانی درجے کی نفوذی طاقت رکھتی ہے؟
questions.explanation: • Beta radiation has intermediate penetrating power between alpha and gamma rays.

questions.q: The maximum mass of an atom is concentrated in _____?
questions.urdu: ایک ایٹم کا زیادہ سے زیادہ وزن _____ میں مرتکز ہے؟

questions.explanation: World Red Cross Day is annually celebrated on 8 May.

questions.q: If (a + bi)(a - bi) = 17 and a + b = 5, then a² + b² equals?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: (a + bi)(a - bi) = a² - (bi)² = a² - b²i² = a² - b²(-1) = a² + b²
